title: Dyeless Concrete Recipes
description: In real life, dye is not required to mix concrete. So why is it a requirement in Minecraft? With this mod, you can craft plain concrete. Then you can mix it later with any dye of your choosing.
body:
# In real life, concrete isn't made with dye. So why is this the case in Minecraft?

![Four new concrete blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25955fbec7f99ab0de7c12eb1e0bf1221109c0c3.png)

Have you ever wanted to make lots of concrete for a build project, but you were limited by how much dye you could collect? Not only is it inconvenient, it's unrealistic.

With this mod, plain concrete has been added. It is identical to regular concrete in function, but it needs no dye to craft (though you can dye it into the vanilla blocks if you like).

Not only will this make your day to day building easier, but it will also make automation with tech mods easier! now your factory doesn't need an entire section dedicated to farming dye. You can easily automate concrete and forget all about it.

You are welcome to use this mod in your modpack!

This mod was made with MCreator.
